/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/faxc_cpp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/faxc_cpp.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/faxc_cpp.dir/src/api/json_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/faxc_cpp.dir/src/backend/codegen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/faxc_cpp.dir/src/backend/optimizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/faxc_cpp.dir/src/backend/analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/faxc_cpp.dir/src/backend/type_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/faxc_cpp.dir/src/backend/symbol_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/faxc_cpp.dir/src/backend/instruction_builder.cpp.o -o faxc_cpp
